CostCalculation.Formula: MIN((WLSINCLAIR + .025), (MCSINCLAIR + .055), (ICSINCLAIR + .047), (WLFHR + .025), (WLCOFFEY + .025), (WLVALERO + .025),(MCFHR + .055), (MCCOFFEY + .055), (MCVALERO + .055), (ICFHR + .047), (ICCOFFEY + .047), (ICVALERO + .047), (WLMARATHON + .025), (WLUSOIL + .025), (WLMANSFIELD + .025), (WLDOOLEYS + .025), (WLGROW + .025), (MCMANSFIELD + .055), (MCMARATHON + .055), (MCDOOLEYS + .055), (MCUSOIL + .055), (MCGROW + .055), (ICMANSFIELD + .047), (ICDOOLEYS + .047), (ICUSOIL + .047), (ICGROW + .047))

CostCalculation.Name: KT Inventory Prices
CostCalculation.Formula: InventoryPrice + (RINMultiplier * BioRIN)

CostCalculation.Name: KT Inventory Prices - Ethanol
CostCalculation.Formula: InventoryPrice + (RINMultiplier * EthanolRIN)
